homeTour.title: Medical Tour Packages
homeTour.description: Complete medical tour packages including treatment, accommodation, and transfer.

section1.title: With You at Every Step: High-Quality Medical Services
section1.desc: From flight tickets to visa support, we take care of every detail to ensure a safe and seamless health journey.

section2.title: Why Kliniken Allianz?
section2.desc: As Kliniken Allianz, we cooperate with the best medical institutions in different countries in the field of health tourism.

details.p1: As Kliniken Allianz Medical Tourism Company, we are a professional team operating in the international medical tourism field, providing patients with access to quality and reliable medical services. Our main goal is to accurately analyze the health needs of each patient and provide them with the most suitable clinic and treatment programs.
details.p2: Our company has an official representation in Germany. This allows us to direct our patients to leading and highly specialized clinics in Germany and organize diagnostic and treatment processes in accordance with international standards. At the same time, we cooperate closely with the best clinics, medical centers, and sanatoriums within Azerbaijan to provide examination, treatment, rehabilitation, and leisure programs.
details.p3: Furthermore, we organize check-up services. These examinations, performed with modern medical equipment, allow for early detection of diseases, general assessment of health status, and timely intervention.
details.p4: We do not limit our services to medical guidance alone. By providing a "full service package" for our patients, we organize the entire process professionally from start to finish:
details.p5: Every patient is unique to us. We provide the most optimal solutions taking into account their wishes, medical condition, and budget. Our goal is not only to organize the treatment process but also to ensure that our patients feel comfortable, safe, and at the center of attention.
details.p6: Operating based on the principles of professionalism, transparency, and reliability, Kliniken Allianz Medical Tourism Company is your reliable partner on the path to your health.

servicesList: Initial consultation and accurate assessment of medical needs
Selection of the appropriate clinic and doctor
Preparation and coordination of the treatment plan
Admission to the clinic and organization of meetings
Airport pick-up and comfortable transfer service
Placement in a hotel, clinic, or sanatorium
Continuous support during and after the treatment period
